---
title: "High Performance Processors"
subtitle: "Module 7 — BCSE205L"
author: "Justus Raju"
date: last-modified
---

## Outline

::: {.incremental}
- Flynn's taxonomy: SISD, SIMD, MISD, MIMD
- Pipelining: two-stage and multi-stage
- Pipeline performance issues and hazards
- Methods to prevent and resolve hazards
- Approaches to deal with branches
- Superscalar architecture
- Superscalar vs. superpipeline architecture
- Performance evaluation: Amdahl's law, speed-up, efficiency
:::

::: {.notes}
This module explores parallel processing architectures, pipelining techniques and their hazards, superscalar design, and performance evaluation methods for parallel processors including Amdahl's law.
:::
